headline: The J.M. Smucker Co. Declares Dividend and Announces Annual Shareholder Meeting Date
summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) today announced its Board of Directors approved a $1.10 per share regular dividend on the common shares of the Company, payable out of the Company's capital surplus. The dividend will be paid on Monday, June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on Friday, May 15, 2026.

headline: MDLZ vs. SJM: Which Branded Food Stock Is Better Positioned Today?
summary: MDLZ and SJM weigh cocoa costs, coffee pricing, cash flow shifts and portfolio moves as branded food demand stays steady.
